/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/DndMonsterManager.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/DndMonsterManager.dir/DndMonsterManager_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DndMonsterManager.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DndMonsterManager.dir/src/model/Monster.cpp.o CMakeFiles/DndMonsterManager.dir/src/gui/MainWindow.cpp.o -o DndMonsterManager  /usr/lib64/libQt6Widgets.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libQt6Gui.so.6.10.3 /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib64/libQt6Core.so.6.10.3
